TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tan-cya_a_tademaw, title = Tan-cya_a_tademaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tan-cya_a_tademaw} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Tan-cya " Ing a kamu, " Tan" a sulit,"Aow ngiha, " tan" daan6, kamuan zayhan malilid nu "cya" gaal ina a ngiha mala u dang6 "Ten" singangan aca tu Tan-hu Tan-hu, Tan-min, zuma ngangan Pay-suy-lang Se-cung Lung-hu, Ma-zen Lu-tin, Cyaw-zen, u palaluma'ay tu balunga' micidekay nu mibutingay a binacadan, zayhan paymihcaan i nanum mauzip pangangan han aca nanumay ci-puzay a tademaw han. Tan-cya a tademawŤúĎŚģ∂ ŤúĎŚģ∂(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Tanka,"ŤúĎ"Ś≠ó,Á≤Ķťü≥:"šĹÜ"daan6,ŚŹ£Ť™ěšł≠Śõ†ŚŹó"Śģ∂"gaa1ŤĀ≤śĮćŚźĆŚĆĖšĹúdang6"ťĄß"), . nilaculan uyzay i balunga' ku nikauzipi nu heni, u kuku' nu heni atu i tukusay mauzip caay kalecad, masakinih u "ci-ti" han pangangan, s-ta-bu pangangan "Tin-hu" han. Tan-cya kalaluma' han ku dudang, palazazan han ku bayu, mibuting ku kawaw, hatu "malikida nu nanum a kasuy" ku sakauzip, tacuwatuwa nayi' ku nipanutek mauzip, angangan maliwliwah i Kwang-tung Bu-cyen Kwang-si, Hai-nan a kakitizaan, hungti a zidayan panutek mikawaw pakucumibu "hwang-ce" pilekec u Tan a binacadan zayhan caay ka i tukus u teked masazuma, kadihian kunikauzip, caay patatukusen mueneng, mizawis pasubana' atu milihiza tu sapiseking, lacus ata tukusay a tademaw malaacawa, acaay pakucumibuen, nika kasazidayan a cen-bu pasubana' tu nitatengilan a kawaw, Tan a binacadan caay pakala u "zumaay a binacadan" Hungti a zidayan yung-ce ayaway a mihcaan palasawaden i kucumibu ku pakuyuc, Kow-min cen-bu i 1934 a mihcaan mihapiw "pasatezep mizipa tu la'cusay a kawaw nu Tan a binacadan" anuayaw kasacenbu a ziday mahizatu micuzuh misumad tu nikauzip nu Tan-cya a binacadan. "Tan" saayaway nisulitan u angangan sanad i ((Pasu) capi nu Cang-cyang Tan a tademaw, zuma nu mipasubana'ay migingkiway nahizasa lalekalan nu timulay Tan a binacadan, makay Cun-ciw a mihca itiza i Lin-suy muneng atu musakawaw. katukuh Cin a ziday hawsa, Pa-su Tan a tademawa tabaki ahebal ku sakawawan. "ŤúĎ" , caay ku Pa-su dada'ay a Cang-cya nutimulan a kakitizaan, mahiziay Cyang-sa, Cang-te a kitizaan Ku-su-cu kitizaan a Syang-si kakitizaan, yadah ku nu makayniay Tan atu Man-tan a nisulitan, hamin pikawawan nu Tan a tademaw anucaay hamin nu Pa-su atu Syang-cyang piculian nu nanum, nika izaw ku nu tukusay mueneng atu nanumay mueneng duduc tu nan-ci-su a nisulitan. ." pipatizengan a mihcaan i "433" 10 a bulad Pa-su Bu-lin-cyun Tan a binacadan naizaw ku tudu'ay Syang-zuy caay palekal misalisin patata tu Di'tu, tawya izaw henay ku mikawaway nu cebu sakay Tan a tademaw mikawaw mihima. saamis a likisi izaw ku nisulitan tu Tyen-he saayaw a mihca Sin-cow Tan a tademaw duduc tu nipaculi, madademec tawya katuku tusa malebut kabatad. katuke i Tang-liw-cung-yen "Lin-nan-cye-tu-can-cyun-tang-ci" nisulit tu kamu" Huy-sang-ci-I,Hu-I-Tan-Mn,suy-si kunipasisil, pakala tu malebut ku tademaw. kaliwliwahŚąÜŚłÉ duduc tu nisulitan i likisi, Lin-nan a sa'wac atu lilis nu minatu tu mangiwitay a kitizaan izaw ku maliwaliwahay nu Tan a tademaw, mapulung muneng, makay si "lung-hu", misalisin tu nanum a Di'tu, masikaz matalaw pakuniza atu mauzip i nanunaman. katuku kahulaman a ziday, Cu-cyang-san-cyaw-co tabaki i bayu misaumah masumad tu ku lala', katukuh zikuz nu kahulaman u cupu amin ku Cu-cyang-san-cyaw-co nisanga' tu masasalilay a kitizian, Tan-cya u nanum ku sakauzip namahiza caay tu kaahebal. nuayawan a kamu kasumad atu tukusay kyazay palahad syakay, Tan a binacadan mabulaw micapi tu niyazu'ay a'wacan mauzip, muculil tayza i Kwang-cow, bu-san, cyang-men a misiwbayay macakat ku niyazu'. u pikinsa ni Ye-syen-en, iayaw nu Ya-pen a kalalais, masaupu i Kwang-cow a sa'wac nu Tan-cya a balunga katukah 84,000, tiza amis Cyang micumud tu San-cyaw-cow sa'wac masasalilal kitizaan a yaw-cung-san-suy a kuwan Lu-paw, nu Tan-cya pisaupuan nu misiwbayay a kitizaan. kamuŤ™ěŤ®Ä . Kwang-tung Tan-cya a tademaw u kmu nu Tan-cyay a kamuan, tungusay Aw a kamu, atu Aw a kamu Kwang-cow a kamu maslecadaytu. Bu-cyen Tan-cya a kamu hatu nu tiniay Layak a kamu. Cw-sin nu mibitingay a kamu, caay henay kahapinang pasasuma tungus cuwaay. nikauzip nu babalakiŚā≥ÁĶĪÁĒüśīĽ duduc i likisi katuuday a binacadan tahkal ku nikinsaan, u bacu nu Tan-cya sanad kapulingan a lalangawan u lisinan, makay kakanen, malaacawa, salisin, lalub nu luma' nipazeng tu tuud katukuh u lisin, atu tukusay a tademaw sangaleb misengiay tu, atu buyu'ay a Yaw anucaay Yi tabaki ku kasazuma. u lisin misalisin tu Hung-sen, PEey-ti, Kwang-ing malecad tu nu muenengay i tukusay a tademaw, nika zayhan matenes mueneng i adidi'ay a balunga sisa micidek ku nikauzip lalangawan, kasumamadan nanumay a tademaw misalisin henay tu buo-cu, Ma-cu atu San-zen-kung. kasizikucŤĎóŤ£ĚśČďśČģ i kasienawan hawsa u Tan-cya a tatayna amin u lumeni'ay a dawa anucaay balubaluan a dayaw ku sipitabu tu tangah, zikuzan nu satabu tu tangah iza henay ku atekakay a tuud "midamaay tu dawa nu tangah" pabaw nu dawa misiw tu "kow-ya-hwa". u zikuc anu tatama tatayna, laylay miyung amin tu salang nu tamak "sapitena' tu lahud" muwaay a zikuc. Tan a binacadan izaw henay tekeday apuyu'ay a calaped, u tanaya' katukuh i pabaw nu tusuz, u sumilaway anucaay abuabuan a kulit, zikuzan nu calaped matapabaw sakasa misakawaw a malalemeda. tatayna amin hina i calapedan izaw ku nipakulitan a bacu ging a satelec, u angangan sakacaay cumudan nu lahud ku tatelecan. paysin, lalangawan atu salisinŚŅĆŤęĪ,šŅ°šĽįŚŹäśĖáŚĆĖ Tan tangah nu balunga mala u damelacay a kitizaan nu Tan-cya, kasumamadan misakinih tu tatayna, lacus ku tatayna miawas tu tangah nu balunga, matalaw awasen nu tatayna ku tangah nu balunga acaay kakapah ku nipibuting. pisalisinan a demiad, Tan a binacadan i tangah nu balunga padepit tu sakalemed a cudad "mabuwah ku tangah nu balunga". katukuh saayaway a mihcaan tu saayaway tahkal ku balunga hawsa, miala tu basis, mauzipay a talamangaw misalisi i tangah nu balunga, misalisin hawsa u takine' ku sapicucuk tu adiping nu talamangaw, ya izang sapisipasip i tangah nu balunga atu tapiingan nu balungna, sakukamu taneng sapiliyas tu lacusay, a kapah kuniculil nu balunga. zuma pahecek tu sumanahay a dawa nisanga' tu "malemeday hata" a pabesuc kapah kuniculil.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tan- ¶ja " iŇč a kamu, " tan" a sur~…ĺit,"aow Ňčińßa, " tan" daan*, kamuan zajńßan mar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu " ¶ja" gaar~…ĺ ina a Ňčińßa mar~…ĺa u daŇč* "t…ôn" siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu tan-ńßu tan-ńßu, tan-min, zuma ŇčaŇčan paj-suj-r~…ĺaŇč s…ô- ¶uŇč r~…ĺuŇč-ńßu, ma-z…ôn r~…ĺu-tin, ¶jaw-z…ôn, u par~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj tu bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° mi ¶id…ôkaj nu mibutiŇčaj a bina ¶adan, zajńßan pajmińß ¶aan i nanum mauzip paŇčaŇčan ńßan a ¶a nanumaj ¶i-puzaj a tad…ômaw ńßan. tan- ¶ja a tad…ômaw** **(**:tanka,"*"*,**:"*"daan*,*****"*"gaa******daŇč*"*"), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ujzaj i bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° ku nikauzipi nu ńß…ôni, u kuku Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni atu i tukusaj mauzip ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, masakinińß u " ¶i-ti" ńßan paŇčaŇčan, s-ta-bu paŇčaŇčan "tin-ńßu" ńßan. tan- ¶ja kar~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ńßan ku dudaŇč, par~…ĺazazan ńßan ku baju, mibutiŇč ku kawaw, ńßatu "mar~…ĺikida nu nanum a kasuj" ku sakauzip, ta ¶uwatuwa naji Ē~ ° ku nipanut…ôk mauzip, aŇčaŇčan mar~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwańß i kwaŇč-tuŇč bu- ¶j…ôn kwaŇč-si, ńßai-nan a kakitizaan, ńßuŇčti a zidajan panut…ôk mikawaw paku ¶umibu "ńßwaŇč- ¶…ô" pir~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶ u tan a bina ¶adan zajńßan ¶aaj ka i tukus u t…ôk…ôd masazuma, kadińßian kunikauzip, ¶aaj patatukus…ôn mu…ôn…ôŇč, mizawis pasubana Ē~ ° atu mir~…ĺińßiza tu sapis…ôkiŇč, r~…ĺa ¶us ata tukusaj a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺaa ¶awa, a ¶aaj paku ¶umibu…ôn, nika kasazidajan a ¶…ôn-bu pasubana Ē~ ° tu nitat…ôŇčir~…ĺan a kawaw, tan a bina ¶adan ¶aaj pakar~…ĺa u "zumaaj a bina ¶adan" ńßuŇčti a zidajan juŇč- ¶…ô ajawaj a mińß ¶aan par~…ĺasawad…ôn i ku ¶umibu ku pakuju ¶, kow-min ¶…ôn-bu i **** a mińß ¶aan mińßapiw "pasat…ôz…ôp mizipa tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a kawaw nu tan a bina ¶adan" anuajaw kasa ¶…ônbu a zidaj mańßizatu mi ¶uzuńß misumad tu nikauzip nu tan- ¶ja a bina ¶adan. "tan" saajawaj nisur~…ĺitan u aŇčaŇčan sanad i ((pasu) ¶api nu ¶aŇč- ¶jaŇč tan a tad…ômaw, zuma nu mipasubana Ē~ °aj migiŇčkiwaj nańßizasa r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu timur~…ĺaj tan a bina ¶adan, makaj ¶un- ¶iw a mińß ¶a itiza i r~…ĺin-suj mun…ôŇč atu musakawaw. katukuńß ¶in a zidaj ńßawsa, pa-su tan a tad…ômawa tabaki ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku sakawawan. "*" , ¶aaj ku pa-su dada Ē~ °aj a ¶aŇč- ¶ja nutimur~…ĺan a kakitizaan, mańßiziaj ¶jaŇč-sa, ¶aŇč-t…ô a kitizaan ku-su- ¶u kitizaan a sjaŇč-si kakitizaan, jadańß ku nu makajniaj tan atu man-tan a nisur~…ĺitan, ńßamin pikawawan nu tan a tad…ômaw anu ¶aaj ńßamin nu pa-su atu sjaŇč- ¶jaŇč pi ¶ur~…ĺian nu nanum, nika izaw ku nu tukusaj mu…ôn…ôŇč atu nanumaj mu…ôn…ôŇč dudu ¶ tu nan- ¶i-su a nisur~…ĺitan. ." pipatiz…ôŇčan a mińß ¶aan i "***" ** a bur~…ĺad pa-su bu-r~…ĺin- ¶jun tan a bina ¶adan naizaw ku tudu Ē~ °aj sjaŇč-zuj ¶aaj par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ misar~…ĺisin patata tu di Ē~ °tu, tawja izaw ńß…ônaj ku mikawawaj nu ¶…ôbu sakaj tan a tad…ômaw mikawaw mińßima. saamis a r~…ĺikisi izaw ku nisur~…ĺitan tu tj…ôn-ńß…ô saajaw a mińß ¶a sin- ¶ow tan a tad…ômaw dudu ¶ tu nipa ¶ur~…ĺi, madad…ôm…ô ¶ tawja katuku tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut kabatad. katuk…ô i taŇč-r~…ĺiw- ¶uŇč-j…ôn "r~…ĺin-nan- ¶j…ô-tu- ¶an- ¶jun-taŇč- ¶i" nisur~…ĺit tu kamu" ńßuj-saŇč- ¶i-i,ńßu-i-tan-mn,suj-si kunipasisir~…ĺ, pakar~…ĺa tu mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku tad…ômaw. kar~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwańß** dudu ¶ tu nisur~…ĺitan i r~…ĺikisi, r~…ĺin-nan a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ atu r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu minatu tu maŇčiwitaj a kitizaan izaw ku mar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańßaj nu tan a tad…ômaw, mapur~…ĺuŇč mun…ôŇč, makaj si "r~…ĺuŇč-ńßu", misar~…ĺisin tu nanum a di Ē~ °tu, masikaz matar~…ĺaw pakuniza atu mauzip i nanunaman. katuku kańßur~…ĺaman a zidaj, ¶u- ¶jaŇč-san- ¶jaw- ¶o tabaki i baju misaumańß masumad tu ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, katukuńß zikuz nu kańßur~…ĺaman u ¶upu amin ku ¶u- ¶jaŇč-san- ¶jaw- ¶o nisaŇča Ē~ ° tu masasar~…ĺir~…ĺaj a kitizian, tan- ¶ja u nanum ku sakauzip namańßiza ¶aaj tu kaańß…ôbar~…ĺ. nuajawan a kamu kasumad atu tukusaj kjazaj par~…ĺańßad sjakaj, tan a bina ¶adan mabur~…ĺaw mi ¶api tu nijazu Ē~ °aj a Ē~ °wa ¶an mauzip, mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tajza i kwaŇč- ¶ow, bu-san, ¶jaŇč-m…ôn a misiwbajaj ma ¶akat ku nijazu Ē~ °. u pikinsa ni j…ô-sj…ôn-…ôn, iajaw nu ja-p…ôn a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais, masaupu i kwaŇč- ¶ow a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ nu tan- ¶ja a bar~…ĺuŇča katukańß **,***, tiza amis ¶jaŇč mi ¶umud tu san- ¶jaw- ¶ow sa Ē~ °wa ¶ masasar~…ĺir~…ĺar~…ĺ kitizaan a jaw- ¶uŇč-san-suj a kuwan r~…ĺu-paw, nu tan- ¶ja pisaupuan nu misiwbajaj a kitizaan. kamu** . kwaŇč-tuŇč tan- ¶ja a tad…ômaw u kmu nu tan- ¶jaj a kamuan, tuŇčusaj aw a kamu, atu aw a kamu kwaŇč- ¶ow a kamu masr~…ĺ…ô ¶adajtu. bu- ¶j…ôn tan- ¶ja a kamu ńßatu nu tiniaj r~…ĺajak a kamu. ¶w-sin nu mibitiŇčaj a kamu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kańßapinaŇč pasasuma tuŇčus ¶uwaaj. nikauzip nu babar~…ĺaki**** dudu ¶ i r~…ĺikisi katuudaj a bina ¶adan tańßkar~…ĺ ku nikinsaan, u ba ¶u nu tan- ¶ja sanad kapur~…ĺiŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan u r~…ĺisinan, makaj kakan…ôn, mar~…ĺaa ¶awa, sar~…ĺisin, r~…ĺar~…ĺub nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nipaz…ôŇč tu tuud katukuńß u r~…ĺisin, atu tukusaj a tad…ômaw saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb mis…ôŇčiaj tu, atu buju Ē~ °aj a jaw anu ¶aaj ji tabaki ku kasazuma. u r~…ĺisin misar~…ĺisin tu ńßuŇč-s…ôn, p…ô…ô-ti, kwaŇč-iŇč mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i tukusaj a tad…ômaw, nika zajńßan mat…ôn…ôs mu…ôn…ôŇč i adidi Ē~ °aj a bar~…ĺuŇča sisa mi ¶id…ôk ku nikauzip r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, kasumamadan nanumaj a tad…ômaw misar~…ĺisin ńß…ônaj tu buo- ¶u, ma- ¶u atu san-z…ôn-kuŇč. kasiziku ¶**** i kasi…ônawan ńßawsa u tan- ¶ja a tatajna amin u r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a dawa anu ¶aaj bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan a dajaw ku sipitabu tu taŇčańß, zikuzan nu satabu tu taŇčańß iza ńß…ônaj ku at…ôkakaj a tuud "midamaaj tu dawa nu taŇčańß" pabaw nu dawa misiw tu "kow-ja-ńßwa". u ziku ¶ anu tatama tatajna, r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj mijuŇč amin tu sar~…ĺaŇč nu tamak "sapit…ôna Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺańßud" muwaaj a ziku ¶. tan a bina ¶adan izaw ńß…ônaj t…ôk…ôdaj apuju Ē~ °aj a ¶ar~…ĺap…ôd, u tanaja Ē~ ° katukuńß i pabaw nu tusuz, u sumir~…ĺawaj anu ¶aaj abuabuan a kur~…ĺit, zikuzan nu ¶ar~…ĺap…ôd matapabaw sakasa misakawaw a mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôm…ôda. tatajna amin ńßina i ¶ar~…ĺap…ôdan izaw ku nipakur~…ĺitan a ba ¶u giŇč a sat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶, u aŇčaŇčan saka ¶aaj ¶umudan nu r~…ĺańßud ku tat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an. pajsin, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu sar~…ĺisin**,***** tan taŇčańß nu bar~…ĺuŇča mar~…ĺa u dam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a kitizaan nu tan- ¶ja, kasumamadan misakinińß tu tatajna, r~…ĺa ¶us ku tatajna miawas tu taŇčańß nu bar~…ĺuŇča, matar~…ĺaw awas…ôn nu tatajna ku taŇčańß nu bar~…ĺuŇča a ¶aaj kakapańß ku nipibutiŇč. pisar~…ĺisinan a d…ômiad, tan a bina ¶adan i taŇčańß nu bar~…ĺuŇča pad…ôpit tu sakar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd a ¶udad "mabuwańß ku taŇčańß nu bar~…ĺuŇča". katukuńß saajawaj a mińß ¶aan tu saajawaj tańßkar~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺuŇča ńßawsa, miar~…ĺa tu basis, mauzipaj a tar~…ĺamaŇčaw misar~…ĺisi i taŇčańß nu bar~…ĺuŇča, misar~…ĺisin ńßawsa u takin…ô Ē~ ° ku sapi ¶u ¶uk tu adipiŇč nu tar~…ĺamaŇčaw, ja izaŇč sapisipasip i taŇčańß nu bar~…ĺuŇča atu tapiiŇčan nu bar~…ĺuŇčna, sakukamu tan…ôŇč sapir~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺa ¶usaj, a kapańß kuni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇča. zuma pańß…ô ¶…ôk tu sumanańßaj a dawa nisaŇča Ē~ ° tu "mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj ńßata" a pab…ôsu ¶ kapańß kuni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Tan-cya " Ing a kamu, " Tan" a sulit,"Aow ngiha, " tan" daan6, kamuan zayhan malilid nu "cya" gaal ina a ngiha mala u dang6 "Ten" singangan aca tu Tan-hu Tan-hu, Tan-min, zuma ngangan Pay-suy-lang Se-cung Lung-hu, Ma-zen Lu-tin, Cyaw-zen, u palaluma'ay tu balunga' micidekay nu mibutingay a binacadan, zayhan paymihcaan i nanum mauzip pangangan han aca nanumay ci-puzay a tademaw han. Tan-cya a tademawŤúĎŚģ∂ ŤúĎŚģ∂(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Tanka,"ŤúĎ"Ś≠ó,Á≤Ķťü≥:"šĹÜ"daan6,ŚŹ£Ť™ěšł≠Śõ†ŚŹó"Śģ∂"gaa1ŤĀ≤śĮćŚźĆŚĆĖšĹúdang6"ťĄß"), . nilaculan uyzay i balunga' ku nikauzipi nu heni, u kuku' nu heni atu i tukusay mauzip caay kalecad, masakinih u "ci-ti" han pangangan, s-ta-bu pangangan "Tin-hu" han. Tan-cya kalaluma' han ku dudang, palazazan han ku bayu, mibuting ku kawaw, hatu "malikida nu nanum a kasuy" ku sakauzip, tacuwatuwa nayi' ku nipanutek mauzip, angangan maliwliwah i Kwang-tung Bu-cyen Kwang-si, Hai-nan a kakitizaan, hungti a zidayan panutek mikawaw pakucumibu "hwang-ce" pilekec u Tan a binacadan zayhan caay ka i tukus u teked masazuma, kadihian kunikauzip, caay patatukusen mueneng, mizawis pasubana' atu milihiza tu sapiseking, lacus ata tukusay a tademaw malaacawa, acaay pakucumibuen, nika kasazidayan a cen-bu pasubana' tu nitatengilan a kawaw, Tan a binacadan caay pakala u "zumaay a binacadan" Hungti a zidayan yung-ce ayaway a mihcaan palasawaden i kucumibu ku pakuyuc, Kow-min cen-bu i 1934 a mihcaan mihapiw "pasatezep mizipa tu la'cusay a kawaw nu Tan a binacadan" anuayaw kasacenbu a ziday mahizatu micuzuh misumad tu nikauzip nu Tan-cya a binacadan. "Tan" saayaway nisulitan u angangan sanad i ((Pasu) capi nu Cang-cyang Tan a tademaw, zuma nu mipasubana'ay migingkiway nahizasa lalekalan nu timulay Tan a binacadan, makay Cun-ciw a mihca itiza i Lin-suy muneng atu musakawaw. katukuh Cin a ziday hawsa, Pa-su Tan a tademawa tabaki ahebal ku sakawawan. "ŤúĎ" , caay ku Pa-su dada'ay a Cang-cya nutimulan a kakitizaan, mahiziay Cyang-sa, Cang-te a kitizaan Ku-su-cu kitizaan a Syang-si kakitizaan, yadah ku nu makayniay Tan atu Man-tan a nisulitan, hamin pikawawan nu Tan a tademaw anucaay hamin nu Pa-su atu Syang-cyang piculian nu nanum, nika izaw ku nu tukusay mueneng atu nanumay mueneng duduc tu nan-ci-su a nisulitan. ." pipatizengan a mihcaan i "433" 10 a bulad Pa-su Bu-lin-cyun Tan a binacadan naizaw ku tudu'ay Syang-zuy caay palekal misalisin patata tu Di'tu, tawya izaw henay ku mikawaway nu cebu sakay Tan a tademaw mikawaw mihima. saamis a likisi izaw ku nisulitan tu Tyen-he saayaw a mihca Sin-cow Tan a tademaw duduc tu nipaculi, madademec tawya katuku tusa malebut kabatad. katuke i Tang-liw-cung-yen "Lin-nan-cye-tu-can-cyun-tang-ci" nisulit tu kamu" Huy-sang-ci-I,Hu-I-Tan-Mn,suy-si kunipasisil, pakala tu malebut ku tademaw. kaliwliwahŚąÜŚłÉ duduc tu nisulitan i likisi, Lin-nan a sa'wac atu lilis nu minatu tu mangiwitay a kitizaan izaw ku maliwaliwahay nu Tan a tademaw, mapulung muneng, makay si "lung-hu", misalisin tu nanum a Di'tu, masikaz matalaw pakuniza atu mauzip i nanunaman. katuku kahulaman a ziday, Cu-cyang-san-cyaw-co tabaki i bayu misaumah masumad tu ku lala', katukuh zikuz nu kahulaman u cupu amin ku Cu-cyang-san-cyaw-co nisanga' tu masasalilay a kitizian, Tan-cya u nanum ku sakauzip namahiza caay tu kaahebal. nuayawan a kamu kasumad atu tukusay kyazay palahad syakay, Tan a binacadan mabulaw micapi tu niyazu'ay a'wacan mauzip, muculil tayza i Kwang-cow, bu-san, cyang-men a misiwbayay macakat ku niyazu'. u pikinsa ni Ye-syen-en, iayaw nu Ya-pen a kalalais, masaupu i Kwang-cow a sa'wac nu Tan-cya a balunga katukah 84,000, tiza amis Cyang micumud tu San-cyaw-cow sa'wac masasalilal kitizaan a yaw-cung-san-suy a kuwan Lu-paw, nu Tan-cya pisaupuan nu misiwbayay a kitizaan. kamuŤ™ěŤ®Ä . Kwang-tung Tan-cya a tademaw u kmu nu Tan-cyay a kamuan, tungusay Aw a kamu, atu Aw a kamu Kwang-cow a kamu maslecadaytu. Bu-cyen Tan-cya a kamu hatu nu tiniay Layak a kamu. Cw-sin nu mibitingay a kamu, caay henay kahapinang pasasuma tungus cuwaay. nikauzip nu babalakiŚā≥ÁĶĪÁĒüśīĽ duduc i likisi katuuday a binacadan tahkal ku nikinsaan, u bacu nu Tan-cya sanad kapulingan a lalangawan u lisinan, makay kakanen, malaacawa, salisin, lalub nu luma' nipazeng tu tuud katukuh u lisin, atu tukusay a tademaw sangaleb misengiay tu, atu buyu'ay a Yaw anucaay Yi tabaki ku kasazuma. u lisin misalisin tu Hung-sen, PEey-ti, Kwang-ing malecad tu nu muenengay i tukusay a tademaw, nika zayhan matenes mueneng i adidi'ay a balunga sisa micidek ku nikauzip lalangawan, kasumamadan nanumay a tademaw misalisin henay tu buo-cu, Ma-cu atu San-zen-kung. kasizikucŤĎóŤ£ĚśČďśČģ i kasienawan hawsa u Tan-cya a tatayna amin u lumeni'ay a dawa anucaay balubaluan a dayaw ku sipitabu tu tangah, zikuzan nu satabu tu tangah iza henay ku atekakay a tuud "midamaay tu dawa nu tangah" pabaw nu dawa misiw tu "kow-ya-hwa". u zikuc anu tatama tatayna, laylay miyung amin tu salang nu tamak "sapitena' tu lahud" muwaay a zikuc. Tan a binacadan izaw henay tekeday apuyu'ay a calaped, u tanaya' katukuh i pabaw nu tusuz, u sumilaway anucaay abuabuan a kulit, zikuzan nu calaped matapabaw sakasa misakawaw a malalemeda. tatayna amin hina i calapedan izaw ku nipakulitan a bacu ging a satelec, u angangan sakacaay cumudan nu lahud ku tatelecan. paysin, lalangawan atu salisinŚŅĆŤęĪ,šŅ°šĽįŚŹäśĖáŚĆĖ Tan tangah nu balunga mala u damelacay a kitizaan nu Tan-cya, kasumamadan misakinih tu tatayna, lacus ku tatayna miawas tu tangah nu balunga, matalaw awasen nu tatayna ku tangah nu balunga acaay kakapah ku nipibuting. pisalisinan a demiad, Tan a binacadan i tangah nu balunga padepit tu sakalemed a cudad "mabuwah ku tangah nu balunga". katukuh saayaway a mihcaan tu saayaway tahkal ku balunga hawsa, miala tu basis, mauzipay a talamangaw misalisi i tangah nu balunga, misalisin hawsa u takine' ku sapicucuk tu adiping nu talamangaw, ya izang sapisipasip i tangah nu balunga atu tapiingan nu balungna, sakukamu taneng sapiliyas tu lacusay, a kapah kuniculil nu balunga. zuma pahecek tu sumanahay a dawa nisanga' tu "malemeday hata" a pabesuc kapah kuniculil.

bar~…ĺuŇča mar~…ĺa u dam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a kitizaan nu tan- ¶ja, kasumamadan misakinińß tu tatajna, r~…ĺa ¶us ku tatajna miawas tu taŇčańß nu bar~…ĺuŇča, matar~…ĺaw awas…ôn nu tatajna ku taŇčańß nu mińß ¶aan tu saajawaj tańßkar~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺuŇča ńßawsa, miar~…ĺa tu basis, mauzipaj a tar~…ĺamaŇčaw misar~…ĺisi i taŇčańß nu bar~…ĺuŇča, misar~…ĺisin ńßawsa u takin…ô Ē~ ° ku sapi ¶u ¶uk tu adipiŇč nu tar~…ĺamaŇčaw, ja izaŇč sapisipasip i taŇčańß nu bar~…ĺuŇča atu tapiiŇčan nu bar~…ĺuŇčna, sakukamu tan…ôŇč sapir~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺa ¶usaj, a kapańß kuni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇča. zuma pańß…ô ¶…ôk tu sumanańßaj a dawa nisaŇča Ē~ ° tu "mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj ńßata" a pab…ôsu ¶ kapańß kuni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ.
